markerSchema.name: GCSlice
markerSchema.description: One slice of an incremental garbage collection (GC). The main thread is blocked during this time.

markerSchema.name: GCMinor
markerSchema.description: A minor GC (aka nursery collection) to clear out the buffer used for recent allocations and move surviving data to the tenured (long-lived) heap.

markerSchema.name: GCMajor
markerSchema.description: Summary data for an entire major GC, encompassing a set of incremental slices. The main thread is not blocked for the entire major GC interval, only for the individual slices.

markerSchema.name: IdlePurgePeek
markerSchema.description: Check if we should purge memory

markerSchema.name: CCSlice
markerSchema.description: Information for an individual CC slice.

markerSchema.name: IdlePurge
markerSchema.description: Purge memory from mozjemalloc in idle time

markerSchema.name: CC
markerSchema.description: Summary data for the core part of a cycle collection, possibly encompassing a set of incremental slices. The thread is not blocked for the entire major CC interval, only for the individual slices.

markerSchema.name: ChannelMarker
markerSchema.description: Timestamp capturing various phases of a network channel's lifespan.

markerSchema.name: HTMLMediaElement:Timeupdate
markerSchema.description: A marker shows the current playback position

markerSchema.name: HTMLMediaElement:BufferedUpdate
markerSchema.description: A marker shows the current buffered ranges
